Changed_Other.mechanism: Enables metrics tracking for HTTP service domains.
Changed_Other.purpose: Provides insights into HTTP service performance, benefiting developers.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string representing the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes in the codebase for better updates.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how timestamps are displayed in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the readability of time-related information for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string related to the version control system.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the efficiency of loading and managing game updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times and responsiveness when displaying time-related information.

Removed_Other.name: DFFlagHttpServiceInsightMetricsDomainsEnabled_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Activates tracking for HTTP service metrics across different domains.
Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances monitoring and troubleshooting of web requests in games.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagActionsBridgeListenToPluginActionsIconChanged_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables the system to respond to changes in plugin action icons.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves user interface by ensuring that icon changes are reflected in real-time.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagOnlyAllowMeshParts_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Restricts the use of certain part types to only mesh parts.
Removed_Other.purpose: Encourages the use of higher quality assets for better visuals.
